data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Rode His BTC Boat Through Choppy Waters Of 2022 Bear Market: 'Didn't Sell Any Bitcoin There, And I Was Rewarded'
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, founder and managing partner of SkyBridge Capital, reflected on his unwavering faith in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) on Tuesday despite being mocked for it in the past.

data.title: Want To Succeed Like Warren Buffett? It Might All Come Down To Who You Surround Yourself With: 'Pick The Right People'
data.description: Billionaire Warren Buffett, who became a millionaire by age 32, shares his secret to success with Gen Z: it's not just about hard work, but also about the company you keep.

data.title: Nvidia-Supplier ASML's CEO Wants Young Leaders To Stop Asking Him This 'Absurd' But Common Question And Do This Instead
data.description: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet's advice for aspiring leaders: Focus on what excites you. Choose joy, not strategic paths.

data.title: AI Is Quietly Reshaping How Companies Screen Resumes — Nearly Half Of Hiring Managers Now Use It
Ray Dalio Says Don't Make The Mistake Of Thinking What's Happening Now Is Due To Trump Tariffs
data.description: Billionaire investor and founder of Bridgewater Associates, Ray Dalio, is sounding the alarm about something far more systemic than tariffs.
